title: ohigginsia refulgens f. ortgiesii
intro: Ohigginsia refulgens f. ortgiesii is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Ohigginsia refulgens f. ortgiesii is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
